title: Probationary Contracts: Termination at End of Year
description: Conroe ISD's rules for ending a teacher's probationary contract at the close of a school year are outlined here. Probationary contracts are typically given to newly hired teachers for a trial period, and this policy explains the conditions under which the district may choose not to renew that contract. Understanding this process helps community members know how the district makes staffing decisions and ensures those decisions follow established, fair procedures.
